correction.rationale: The current mask satisfies the right_foot_base anatomy and visible-boundary contract; no correction is justified.

judgments.evidence: The candidate matches the semantically assigned right foot and covers the visible foot base. The toes are excluded at a plausible MTP boundary, so this is not an impermissible whole-foot mask.

observations.full_context: The highlighted target is the character's right foot, consistent with the supplied semantic pose-chain evidence; the cyan ROI encloses the foreground foot and ankle rather than the crossed rear foot.
observations.mask: The mask is one connected component covering the ankle, heel, instep, and proximal forefoot while stopping before the visible toe segments. It does not include the rear foot or background.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No meaningful overlap with the adjacent rear foot, toes, clothing, or gray background is visible.
observations.overlay: The red overlay follows the visible outer ankle, heel, dorsal instep, and plantar edge. Its distal boundary is positioned near the toe-base/MTP split rather than forming a whole-foot silhouette.
observations.source_crop: The visible target is a single continuous bare foot-base region with ankle and instep visible. Toes extend to the right and are anatomically separable at the metatarsophalangeal region.

correction.rationale: Mask boundary, coverage, and side assignment are all correct; no correction needed.

judgments.evidence: Mask correctly isolates the right foot base (ankle to MTP line) per pose-chain side evidence and ontology boundary rule, with no toe inclusion, no background leakage, and no clothing contamination.

observations.contour: Contour line traces the ankle top, lateral foot edge, and heel/sole curve accurately, with the anterior boundary cutting sharply at the toe-base line as required.
observations.full_context: The cyan ROI box marks the forward foot in the frontal-leaning pose; pose-chain evidence places the right ankle joint closest to this candidate's centroid (178px vs 692px for left), confirming this is the character's right foot.
observations.mask: Binary mask covers the ankle down through the dorsum and arch of the foot, terminating in a clean near-vertical cut just before the toe bases, consistent with the foot_mtp boundary rule.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No overlap with the opposite foot/leg visible in the crop; the excluded toe region is clearly separated from the masked base, avoiding neighbor_part contamination.
observations.overlay: Red overlay aligns tightly with the visible foot skin from ankle to MTP line; toes remain unmasked and background/floor is not included.
observations.source_crop: High-res crop shows the foot from ankle to toe bases, with visible tendons/veins and toenails at the far right edge that are excluded from the target region.
